creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Chris Hutchinson from comment #13)
The new patch installs files in share/icons directly instead of in its own 
subdirectory.  That's not acceptable.

XMASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_GNOME}
XMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	teams/art.gnome.org/themes/icon

Does

MASTER_SITES=	GNOME/teams/art.gnome.org/themes/icon

not work instead?
